channel.title: Dev-Tools on Tenkai
channel.description: Recent content in Dev-Tools on Tenkai

item.title: Tenkai Daily — March 20, 2026
item.description:
Today’s Synthesis
If you’re building tools that require natural language interaction with AI systems, pair the mcp-cli ([mcp-cli](https://github.com/apify/mcp-cli)) with existing MCP servers like AbletonMCP ([AbletonMCP](https://github.com/ahujasid/ableton-mcp)) to prototype domain-specific integrations rapidly. For example, engineers could use mcp-cli to issue commands like "Create a new track in Ableton with a synth at 120 BPM" directly in the terminal, bypassing the need to write custom server logic. This approach leverages AbletonMCP’s existing MCP implementation to automate music production workflows via text, which could be adapted to other fields (e.g., generating code snippets, simulating hardware states) by building MCP servers for your tools. The result? Faster iteration on AI-assisted automation without reinventing the wheel for server communication.

item.title: Tenkai Daily — March 19, 2026
item.description:
Model Releases

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16 — 120B parameter MoE language model in BF16, supporting European/Asian languages with Azure deployment.

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-NVFP4 — 8-bit NVFP4 quantized variant of Nemotron 3 Super for efficient inference.

nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-FP8 — FP8 precision version optimized for high-throughput inference with Azure deployment.

Jackrong/Qwen3.5-27B-Claude-4.6-Opus-Reasoning-Distilled — Distilled reasoning model emulating Claude 4.6 Opus capabilities for logical tasks.

Tesslate/OmniCoder-9B — Image-to-text-to-text coding agent for conversational code assistance.

Lightricks/LTX-2.3 — Video generation suite supporting text/image/audio-to-video transformations.
